article_title: Burnaby Council — 8.2. Attachment 1 - REZ 25-11 - Part 2 of 3 - Shadow Study, Site Plan and Subdivision Plan 2026-04-14.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to Consider Rezoning Application REZ 25-11 — Shadow, Site & Subdivision Plans
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to review technical planning documents — including a shadow study, site plan, and subdivision plan — for rezoning application REZ 25-11. These documents are part of a proposal to change how a specific property can be used or developed.
briefs.action_required: Check the Burnaby Council meeting agenda for REZ 25-11 if your business is near the affected property.
